title: The Social Trap: 5 Women vs the Big 5
original_title: Emprise numérique, 5 femmes contre les Big 5
overview: American states and parents in both Europe and the United States are engaging in a joint fight against digital giants to ensure their responsibility in the addiction of young people to screens and social media is recognized. Among them, five women have chosen to disrupt their daily lives: Alexis, Kathleen, Elisabet, Laure, and Socheata.
